instructions.name: auto_finalize_holders
docs: Auto-burn holder option tokens + auto-pay ITM USDC for a settled vault.
Permissionless. Caller passes `remaining_accounts` as pairs of
(holder_option_ata, holder_usdc_ata). Idempotent: zero-amount accounts
and mismatched USDC ATAs are skipped silently.
See docs/AUTO_FINALIZE_PLAN.md.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless caller — pays the tx fee. Not stored anywhere.

accounts.name: shared_vault
docs: The settled shared vault.

accounts.name: market
docs: The vault's market — pinned to the vault for sanity, not read in handler.

accounts.name: vault_mint_record
docs: Per-mint tracking record. Pins option_mint to this vault so callers
can't pass an unrelated mint with a matching vault.

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: The Token-2022 option mint being burned from. Must be `mut` so the
burn CPI can decrement `supply` on the mint account.

accounts.name: vault_usdc_account
docs: Vault's USDC account — payout source.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — PermanentDelegate authority on every option mint.
Signs as `[b"protocol_v2", &[bump]]` to authorize the burns.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — for burning option tokens.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token program — for USDC transfers from vault → holder.

instructions.name: burn_unsold_from_vault
docs: Burn unsold option tokens from a vault mint, freeing committed collateral.

accounts.name: writer
docs: The writer burning their unsold tokens.

accounts.name: shared_vault
docs: The shared vault.

accounts.name: writer_position
docs: Writer's position in the vault.

accounts.name: vault_mint_record
docs: VaultMint record for this specific mint.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — signs as purchase escrow owner for the burn.

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: The Token-2022 option mint being burned.

accounts.name: purchase_escrow
docs: Purchase escrow holding the unsold tokens.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

accounts.name: writer_usdc_account

instructions.name: create_market
docs: Register a supported asset (permissionless, idempotent).
One Market PDA per asset; strike/expiry/type live on SharedVault.
`pyth_feed_id` is the 32-byte Pyth Pull feed ID for the asset.

accounts.name: creator
docs: Permissionless — anyone can call. Pays for account creation on
first init; pays nothing on idempotent re-call because
`init_if_needed` short-circuits when the account already exists.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Global ProtocolState — mutated to bump total_markets on first init.

accounts.name: market
docs: Asset registry PDA. One per supported asset.

instructions.name: create_shared_vault
docs: Create a new shared collateral vault for a specific option specification.

accounts.name: creator
docs: The vault creator (first writer). Pays for account creation.

accounts.name: market
docs: The OptionsMarket this vault is for. Must exist and be active.

accounts.name: shared_vault
docs: The SharedVault PDA — unique per (market, strike, expiry, option_type).

accounts.name: vault_usdc_account
docs: The vault's USDC token account. Authority = shared_vault PDA.
This holds all the collateral deposited by writers.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — validated against the protocol's stored USDC mint.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — for USDC mint validation.

accounts.name: epoch_config
docs: Epoch config — required for Epoch vaults, optional for Custom.
When present, used to validate the expiry aligns with the epoch schedule.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token program — for the USDC token account.

instructions.name: deposit_to_vault
docs: Deposit USDC collateral into a shared vault and receive shares.

accounts.name: writer
docs: The writer depositing collateral.

accounts.name: shared_vault
docs: The vault to deposit into. Must not be settled or expired.

accounts.name: writer_position
docs: Writer's position in this vault. Created on first deposit (init_if_needed).

accounts.name: writer_usdc_account
docs: Writer's USDC token account — source of collateral.

accounts.name: vault_usdc_account
docs: Vault's USDC token account — destination for collateral.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — for USDC mint validation.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token program — for USDC transfers.

accounts.name: shared_vault

accounts.name: market

accounts.name: holder_option_account
docs: Holder's option token account (Token-2022).

accounts.name: vault_usdc_account
docs: Vault's USDC account — payout source.

accounts.name: protocol_state

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — for burning option tokens.

accounts.name: token_program

instructions.name: initialize_epoch_config
docs: Initialize the epoch schedule (admin-only, one-time setup).

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin — must match protocol_state.admin.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — used to verify the admin.

accounts.name: epoch_config
docs: The epoch config PDA — created once, never recreated.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin who is initializing the protocol. They pay for account rent
and become the protocol admin.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: ProtocolState PDA — the global config singleton.
`init` means Anchor will create this account. If it already exists,
the transaction fails (preventing double-initialization).

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — a USDC token account owned by the protocol PDA.
This is where protocol fees accumulate.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint account. On devnet, this is a test mint.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: Required system programs for account creation.

instructions.name: migrate_pyth_feed
docs: Rotate the Pyth Pull feed_id stored on an existing OptionsMarket.
Admin-only; idempotent on same feed_id; overwrites on different.
No oracle call — only mutates registry metadata.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must match `protocol_state.admin`. Verified in the handler.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Global ProtocolState — read-only here, used to verify the admin key.

accounts.name: market
docs: The market whose Pyth feed_id is being rotated. PDA seeds enforce
existence — passing an unknown asset_name fails seed validation
(AccountNotInitialized).

instructions.name: mint_from_vault
docs: Mint Living Option Tokens from a shared vault using writer's collateral share.

docs: The writer minting option tokens.

accounts.name: shared_vault

accounts.name: writer_position

accounts.name: market
docs: The OptionsMarket — for strike price, expiry, asset info in metadata.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — mint authority and permanent delegate for Token-2022.

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Token-2022 mint for the option tokens — created manually via CPI.

accounts.name: purchase_escrow
docs: Purchase escrow — holds minted tokens until buyers purchase.

accounts.name: vault_mint_record

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList PDA — created by the hook program during CPI.

accounts.name: hook_state
docs: HookState PDA — stores expiry + protocol PDA for the transfer hook.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — for the option mint and token accounts.

accounts.name: shared_vault

accounts.name: writer_position

accounts.name: vault_mint_record
docs: VaultMint record — holds premium_per_contract and quantity tracking.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — for fee_bps, volume tracking, and token transfer signing.

accounts.name: market
docs: The OptionsMarket — for expiry validation.

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Option token mint (Token-2022).

accounts.name: purchase_escrow
docs: Purchase escrow holding unsold tokens (Token-2022 account).

accounts.name: buyer_option_account
docs: Buyer's option token account (Token-2022). Frontend creates ATA before calling.

accounts.name: buyer_usdc_account
docs: Buyer's USDC account — pays premium from here.

accounts.name: vault_usdc_account
docs: Vault's USDC account — receives writer's share of premium.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — receives protocol fee.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token program — for USDC transfers.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — for option token transfers.

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: Transfer hook program.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList for the transfer hook.

instructions.name: settle_expiry
docs: Record the canonical settlement price for an (asset, expiry) tuple
from a Pyth Pull `PriceUpdateV2` account. Permissionless — anyone
can call once the (asset, expiry) is past expiry and a fresh Pyth
update is on-chain.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless. Caller pays for SettlementRecord rent.

accounts.name: market
docs: OptionsMarket — provides the canonical feed_id for this asset.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: Fresh PriceUpdateV2 from the Pyth Receiver program. Validated by
`get_price_no_older_than(.., &market.pyth_feed_id)` for both feed_id
match and staleness.

accounts.name: settlement_record
docs: The SettlementRecord PDA. Plain `init` — second call for the same
(asset, expiry) reverts.

instructions.name: settle_vault
docs: Settle a shared vault. Permissionless — reads the canonical price
from a SettlementRecord PDA written earlier by `settle_expiry`.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Permissionless — anyone can settle a vault once the SettlementRecord
for its (asset, expiry) exists.

accounts.name: shared_vault
docs: The shared vault to settle.

accounts.name: market
docs: The vault's market — needed to derive the SettlementRecord PDA from
`market.asset_name`. Constraint pins it to the vault's recorded market.

accounts.name: settlement_record
docs: The canonical settlement record for this (asset, expiry). If none
exists, anchor's seed validation + Account deserialization fails
before the handler runs.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the protocol admin

errors.name: ExpiryInPast
errors.msg: Expiry timestamp must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidStrikePrice
errors.msg: Strike price must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidAssetName
errors.msg: Asset name must be 1-16 ASCII uppercase letters or digits

errors.name: InvalidAssetClass
errors.msg: Asset class must be 0-4 (crypto, commodity, equity, forex, etf)

errors.name: AssetMismatch
errors.msg: Market already exists for this asset with different metadata

errors.name: MarketNotExpired
errors.msg: Market has not expired yet

errors.name: MarketNotSettled
errors.msg: Market has not been settled yet

errors.name: InvalidSettlementPrice
errors.msg: Settlement price must be greater than zero

errors.name: UnsupportedCollateral
errors.msg: Collateral mint must be the protocol's USDC mint

errors.name: InsufficientCollateral
errors.msg: Insufficient collateral for this option

errors.name: InvalidContractSize
errors.msg: Contract size must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidPremium
errors.msg: Premium must be greater than zero

errors.name: NotWriter
errors.msg: Only the writer can perform this action

errors.name: CannotBuyOwnOption
errors.msg: Cannot buy your own option

errors.name: InsufficientOptionTokens
errors.msg: Insufficient option tokens to exercise

errors.name: OptionExpired
errors.msg: Option has already expired — cannot price

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: CustomVaultSingleWriter
errors.msg: Custom vaults only allow the original creator to deposit

errors.name: VaultAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Vault has been settled, no more deposits allowed

errors.name: VaultExpired
errors.msg: Vault expiry has passed

errors.name: InvalidEpochExpiry
errors.msg: Invalid epoch expiry - must fall on configured day and hour

errors.name: InsufficientVaultCollateral
errors.msg: Insufficient free collateral in writer's vault position

errors.name: CollateralCommitted
errors.msg: Collateral is committed to active options and cannot be withdrawn

errors.name: NoTokensToBurn
errors.msg: No unsold tokens to burn

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: Nothing to claim - all premium already withdrawn

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Premium exceeds buyer's maximum (slippage protection)

errors.name: VaultNotSettled
errors.msg: Vault not yet settled

errors.name: OptionNotInTheMoney
errors.msg: Option is not in the money - cannot exercise

errors.name: InvalidVaultMint
errors.msg: Option mint does not belong to this vault

errors.name: ClaimPremiumFirst
errors.msg: Claim all premium before withdrawing shares

errors.name: InvalidBatchAccounts
errors.msg: remaining_accounts length must be a multiple of 2 (holder_option_ata, holder_usdc_ata pairs)

fields.name: authority
docs: Who can modify the epoch schedule (protocol admin).

fields.name: weekly_expiry_day
docs: Day of week for weekly expiries. 0 = Sunday, 5 = Friday, 6 = Saturday.

fields.name: weekly_expiry_hour
docs: Hour (UTC, 0-23) for weekly expiries. Default 8 = 08:00 UTC.

fields.name: monthly_enabled
docs: Whether the last Friday of each month has a separate monthly epoch.

fields.name: min_epoch_duration_days
docs: Minimum days to expiry for new epoch vaults (e.g., 1 day).
Prevents creating vaults that expire too soon.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: OptionType
docs: Whether this option is a call (right to buy) or put (right to sell).
Lives on `SharedVault` post-Stage-2; kept here because vaults import it.

fields.name: asset_name
docs: Human-readable, normalized asset identifier ("SOL", "BTC", "AAPL", ...).
Max 16 chars, ASCII-uppercase, alphanumeric only.

fields.name: pyth_feed_id
docs: The 32-byte Pyth Pull oracle feed ID for this asset.
Stage P1: stored without on-chain validation. Stage P2 settle_expiry
will validate this matches the `feed_id` on a passed-in PriceUpdateV2
account via `get_price_no_older_than(.., &feed_id)`.

fields.name: asset_class
docs: Asset class for categorizing the underlying asset.
0 = crypto, 1 = commodity, 2 = equity, 3 = forex, 4 = ETF.
Metadata-only today — no surviving on-chain or frontend pricing
logic branches on this value.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: feed_id
docs: `FeedId` but avoid the type alias because of compatibility issues with Anchor's `idl-build` feature.

fields.name: publish_time
docs: The timestamp of this price update in seconds

fields.name: prev_publish_time
docs: The timestamp of the previous price update. This field is intended to allow users to
identify the single unique price update for any moment in time:
for any time t, the unique update is the one such that prev_publish_time < t <= publish_time.
Note that there may not be such an update while we are migrating to the new message-sending logic,
as some price updates on pythnet may not be sent to other chains (because the message-sending
logic may not have triggered). We can solve this problem by making the message-sending mandatory
(which we can do once publishers have migrated over).
Additionally, this field may be equal to publish_time if the message is sent on a slot where
where the aggregation was unsuccesful. This problem will go away once all publishers have
migrated over to a recent version of pyth-agent.

types.name: PriceUpdateV2
docs: A price update account. This account is used by the Pyth Receiver program to store a verified price update from a Pyth price feed.
It contains:
- `write_authority`: The write authority for this account. This authority can close this account to reclaim rent or update the account to contain a different price update.
- `verification_level`: The [`VerificationLevel`] of this price update. This represents how many Wormhole guardian signatures have been verified for this price update.
- `price_message`: The actual price update.
- `posted_slot`: The slot at which this price update was posted.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin wallet that can update protocol settings.
Set to the signer of the `initialize_protocol` transaction.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Fee charged on option purchases, in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).
Default: 50 bps = 0.50%.
Example: on a 100 USDC premium, the fee is 0.50 USDC.

fields.name: treasury
docs: The treasury token account (PDA) that collects protocol fees in USDC.

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint address. Stored so all instructions can validate that
token accounts are denominated in USDC.

fields.name: total_markets
docs: Running count of all markets created. Used for stats/tracking.

fields.name: total_volume
docs: Running total of all USDC volume (premiums + settlements) flowing
through the protocol. Scaled by 10^6 (USDC decimals).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed, stored so we don't have to recalculate it.

fields.name: asset_name
docs: Asset this settlement is for. Matches OptionsMarket.asset_name
(already normalized to ASCII uppercase + alphanumeric by the
market PDA derivation).

fields.name: expiry
docs: Unix timestamp of the expiry boundary this settlement records.

fields.name: settlement_price
docs: Canonical settlement price for this (asset, expiry), scaled by 1e6
(USDC decimals). Today this is admin-supplied (Pyth-mocked); in
production it would be read from a Pyth pull-oracle account.

fields.name: settled_at
docs: On-chain timestamp at which `settle_expiry` was called. Useful for
audit trails and "settle was X seconds late" diagnostics.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: market
docs: Which OptionsMarket this vault belongs to.

fields.name: option_type
docs: Call or Put — reuses the existing OptionType enum from market.rs.

fields.name: strike_price
docs: Strike price in USDC (6 decimals). Example: $200.00 = 200_000_000.

fields.name: expiry
docs: Unix timestamp when all options in this vault expire.

fields.name: vault_type
docs: Epoch (shared, Friday expiries) or Custom (single writer, any expiry).

fields.name: total_collateral
docs: Total USDC locked across all writers in this vault (6 decimals).

fields.name: total_shares
docs: Total shares issued to all writers. First depositor gets 1:1 ratio,
subsequent depositors get proportional shares.

fields.name: vault_usdc_account
docs: The USDC token account holding this vault's collateral.
Authority = this SharedVault PDA.

fields.name: collateral_mint
docs: Stage 3: the mint of the collateral token. USDC-only enforced today
via a runtime check in `create_shared_vault` against
`protocol_state.usdc_mint`. The field exists so every vault is
self-describing — the 6 ATA-mint constraints across vault-context
instructions read from here rather than from protocol_state, which
keeps the door open for per-vault collateral diversification later.

fields.name: total_options_minted
docs: Total option tokens minted from this vault across all writers.

fields.name: total_options_sold
docs: Total option tokens that have been purchased by buyers.

fields.name: net_premium_collected
docs: Total premium collected in this vault (USDC, 6 decimals).
FIX L-04: renamed from premium_collected for clarity.

fields.name: premium_per_share_cumulative
docs: FIX H-01: Cumulative premium per share, scaled by 1e12.
Implements reward-per-share accumulator pattern to prevent
late-depositor premium dilution.

fields.name: is_settled
docs: Whether this vault has been settled after expiry.

fields.name: settlement_price
docs: Final settlement price (0 until settled). Copied from market.

fields.name: collateral_remaining
docs: Collateral remaining after settlement payouts. Writers withdraw from this.

fields.name: creator
docs: Who created this vault (the first depositor).
For Custom vaults, this is the only allowed depositor.

fields.name: created_at
docs: When this vault was created.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: vault
docs: Which SharedVault this mint belongs to.

fields.name: writer
docs: The writer who created this mint.

fields.name: option_mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint pubkey.

fields.name: premium_per_contract
docs: Writer's asking price per contract (USDC, 6 decimals).
This is what buyers pay when purchasing from this mint.

fields.name: quantity_minted
docs: How many option tokens were originally minted.

fields.name: quantity_sold
docs: How many option tokens have been sold to buyers.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp when this mint was created (also used as PDA seed nonce).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: VaultType
docs: Whether this vault is an epoch (shared) or custom (single-writer) vault.

types.name: VerificationLevel
docs: Pyth price updates are bridged to all blockchains via Wormhole.
Using the price updates on another chain requires verifying the signatures of the Wormhole guardians.
The usual process is to check the signatures for two thirds of the total number of guardians, but this can be cumbersome on Solana because of the transaction size limits,
so we also allow for partial verification.
This enum represents how much a price update has been verified:
- If `Full`, we have verified the signatures for two thirds of the current guardians.
- If `Partial`, only `num_signatures` guardian signatures have been checked.
# Warning
Using partially verified price updates is dangerous, as it lowers the threshold of guardians that need to collude to produce a malicious price update.

fields.name: owner
docs: The writer's wallet address.

fields.name: vault
docs: Which SharedVault this position belongs to.

fields.name: shares
docs: Writer's proportional share of the vault.
Used to calculate their cut of premium and remaining collateral.

fields.name: deposited_collateral
docs: Total USDC this writer has deposited into the vault.
Tracked for reference — the authoritative value is shares.

fields.name: premium_claimed
docs: How much premium this writer has already claimed.
Prevents double-claiming.

fields.name: premium_debt
docs: FIX H-01: Snapshot of premium_per_share_cumulative at deposit time.
Used in reward-per-share accumulator to prevent late-depositor dilution.

fields.name: options_minted
docs: Total option tokens this writer has minted from their vault share.
Used to calculate committed collateral (can't withdraw what's backing active options).

fields.name: options_sold
docs: How many of this writer's minted tokens have been sold to buyers.

fields.name: deposited_at
docs: When this position was first created.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.
